name: Where Is? Find Hidden Objects
author: Poki
description: Where Is? Find Hidden Objects is a scavenger hunt game that puts your observation skills to the test! Search through vibrant, colorful pictures and uncover all the hidden objects waiting to be found. Explore a variety of adorable worlds and challenge yourself to spot everything in timed mode. Train your eyes and brain to get faster and sharper. Can you find all the hidden objects in one go? How to play Where Is? Find Hidden Objects? Click or tap to choose an item. Who created Where Is? Find Hidden Objects? Where Is? Find Hidden Objects is created by Unico Studio.
